mapper.sql: id, receiver_user_id, actor_user_id, type, article_id, comment_id, payload_json, read_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_notification WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT FROM blog_notification WHERE receiver_user_id = #{receiverUserId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
AND read_at IS NULL
AND read_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_notification WHERE receiver_user_id = #{receiverUserId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
AND read_at IS NULL
AND read_at IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_notification WHERE receiver_user_id = #{receiverUserId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND read_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_notification (id, receiver_user_id, actor_user_id, type, article_id, comment_id, payload_json, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{receiverUserId}, #{actorUserId}, #{type}, #{articleId}, #{commentId}, #{payloadJson}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_notification SET read_at = #{readAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_notification SET read_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{notificationId} AND receiver_user_id = #{receiverUserId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_notification SET read_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE receiver_user_id = #{receiverUserId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND read_at IS NULL
